positive: A mesmerizing geometric landscape featuring stylized flora and cosmic elements. Focus on stylized bioluminescent jungle motifs intertwined with celestial constellations and crystalline mountain ranges. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally balanced, featuring clean, bold silhouettes against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. Use a neo-art deco aesthetic mixed with ethereal watercolor washes. The overall style must resemble high-contrast screen-printed graphic design or minimalist vector illustration, suitable for apparel. Deep blues, emerald greens, gold accents, and stark white highlights are mandatory. Sharp edges and clean divisions are key.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, graffiti, sketch, photorealism, low resolution, cluttered
